title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Blue Star India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Blue Star India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
